what: Check content for quality indicators (structure, length, headings, code blocks)
why: Ensure knowledge is useful and well-structured for AI consumption

output.console: Content quality assessment with scores for structure, length, and formatting

success_handling.criteria: Content meets quality thresholds: adequate length, has recognizable structure (headings, sections), and includes useful formatting (code blocks, lists)

event.message: Content quality check passed for entry {entry_id}

error_handling.criteria: Content fails one or more quality checks (too short, no structure, no formatting)
error_handling.action: Record quality findings as audit issues, continue audit to collect all issues

event.message: Content quality below threshold for entry {entry_id}: {quality_issues}

decisions.outcome: Record findings, proceed to check-ai-originality step
